programmes.show_description: Life in the Fast Food Lane: Comedy-drama series. Arthur gets into the car phone business with a dodgy supplier, and Terry fancies a girl who tries to hide her rich family background.
Ate the Hamburger, Wearing the Hats: American sitcom about a well-off bachelor. Charlie is offended when Alan chooses his cousins as Jake's guardians in the event of his death.
An Old Flame with a New Wick: American sitcom about a rich bachelor whose brother and young nephew move in with him. Charlie is stunned to learn that an ex-girlfriend is now a man.

Contact Breaker: Cult '70s police drama series. A bank robbery looks like an inside job, but Regan thinks otherwise and tries to prove that a convict on parole was framed.
Disappearing Trick: Adventure series about a European crime-fighting team. A multi-millionaire's son approaches the Protectors for help proving that he can vanish without a trace.
Action from the day's fixtures, including Coventry v Sheffield Wednesday, Norwich v Ipswich, Leicester v Swansea and Sheffield United v Hull in the Championship.
Aunt Bessie's and Navigator Clocks: Discover how the nation's favourite Yorkshire puddings are made and the British clockmaker paying tribute to a man that changed history.
Sharpe's Sword: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. A young nun flees in terror when a carriage travelling through the Spanish countryside is ambushed by French soldiers.
Sharpe's Regiment: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. June 1813 - the Duke of Wellington sends Sharpe to England to investigate when he is told of a lack of recruits there.

programmes.show_name: ITV Racing Live: Sky Bet Sunday Series
programmes.show_description: Musselburgh: Oli Bell presents coverage of the first round of the Sunday Series from Musselburgh racecourse. Commentary comes from Stewart Machin.

VII: Swashbuckling action-adventure drama. Flint tells Gates the truth, Randall puts Silver in a bind, Eleanor suffers a loss, Max comes to Rackham's aid, and Vane has a big fight.
Fishy Automotives: Reality series. The team battle against the elements as mass floods threaten to wreck the automotive treasures left behind by generations of commercial fisheries.

Death and Taxes: Higgins jets off to Maui and leaves Thomas with income tax returns to work on, but a psycho killer disturbs the PI's concentration.
Monkey on a String: Classic US detective drama. A down-on-his-luck cop with a gambling problem ends up owing money to a gangster who offers to clear the debt if he kills Crocker.
The Queen's Ransom: Suave freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar embarks on another case. The Saint is persuaded to accompany a former king on an important mission in Switzerland.
Stamp Duty: Classic drama. There is a puzzle for Ken and Harry to solve when a simple case of tracking down a witness turns into a tale of double-crossing and missing money.
Faces: Police series. When a gang hijack an armoured security truck, Regan, Carter and the Flying Squad set up an ambush to catch the crooks. But who's the informer?
Mechanical Madness: US robot combat series. Two brilliant drivers face off in the Main Event when Whiplash is up against Skorpios, and a real live snake makes an appearance.
Little Girl Who: Classic US action drama series. Thomas helps his ex-wife Michelle and her five-year-old daughter escape Vietnam before they are murdered by rogue troops.
Kiss It All Goodbye: Classic US detective drama. Crocker's future is in jeopardy after he accidentally shoots a woman while trying to stop a robbery.
Interlude in Venice: Freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar embarks on another case. The Saint visits Venice to save a damsel in distress but is then plunged into a seedy underworld.
Macguffin's Transputer: There's chaos at Crawford Boon as their secretary Laura leaves in the middle of a complicated investigation into industrial espionage.
Supersnout: An informant of Regan's tells him about a hijack involving a lorryload of cigarettes where he will be the look-out man. But can Regan trust his snout?
From Fulham with Love: Comedy-drama series. Arthur extends the grasping hand of free enterprise across the Iron Curtain when a Russian ship arrives in port.
Sharpe's Sword: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. A young nun flees in terror when a carriage travelling through the Spanish countryside is ambushed by French soldiers.
